name: Local 58
description:
58 WCLV-TV is a fictional TV station and is the in-universe source of the LOCAL58 YouTube series. Originally founded in 1939[1] and broadcasting since 1938 in Mason County, West Virginia, USA,[2] the station serves the fictional towns of Edenvale, Lasker City, and Ichor Falls

"EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM"

"DO NOT LOOK AT THE MOON"

By The Way. Go And Check Out On Local 58 Series It's Creepy And Cool

Of Course, Support The Original Creator
creator: John_dude
